name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN, offers money transfers and check-cashing services daily 7AM-9PM.
description_long:
Western Union's location at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr serves Indianapolis, IN residents with check-cashing and money transfer services. This standalone center in the Fall Creek area operates seven days a week from 7AM to 9PM. The Indianapolis branch provides convenient access for residents across the wider metro area.

This Western Union in Indianapolis handles international money transfers, domestic wire transfers, and check-cashing transactions. Call +1 317-614-4046 to confirm availability or ask about fees and exchange rates. Staff can assist with wire transfer destinations, documentation requirements, and timing for transactions.

For Indianapolis residents needing quick cash or international wire services, this location provides an accessible alternative to traditional banks. Bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction. The Fall Creek location is one of several Western Union centers convenient to Indianapolis neighborhoods.
address: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

company_info.headquarters: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations in the US across major retail chains (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online sending capability through WU.com, with in-store cash pickup available during agent location hours
Multi-language support in six languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Multiple service options including money transfers, money orders, bill payment, mobile top-up, and prepaid card access
Real-time transfer tracking system for monitoring sent funds
Rewards program (Western Union Rewards) for regular users
No bank account required for basic services like cash pickup and money orders
cons: Fees are typically higher than digital money transfer alternatives like Venmo, PayPal, or bank wire transfers
Agent location hours vary by retailer, limiting late-night or weekend access at some locations
International transfer exchange rates may be less competitive than currency exchange specialists
Website shows 'Orange wallet temporarily unavailable' message, indicating service disruptions
Limited innovation compared to fintech competitors in the money transfer space
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing cash access without a bank account
Immigrants and international families sending money to relatives in other countries
Consumers in rural areas where Western Union agent locations provide rare access to financial services
Users who prefer in-person transactions over digital-only money transfer apps
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants, and those in underserved areas who need reliable cash access and money transfer capabilities. The primary caveat is that fees are substantially higher than modern digital alternatives, making it suitable primarily for users without bank accounts or those prioritizing convenience over cost optimization.
services: Online money transfers (send money via WU.com)
meta_description: Indianapolis, IN Western Union at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr – money transfers and check-cashing, 7AM-9PM daily.
